title: Notification No.34/2007-Cus(NT), dated 26.04.2007
text: Notification No.34/2007-Customs (N.T.) dated the 26th April 2007 In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Import), Chennai, to act as common adjudicating authority in respect of the matters specified in the corresponding entries in columns (2) and (3) of the Table below for the purpose of adjudication and investigation of such matters, namely :- Table Sl. No. Name of the party Show Cause Notice No. and date Designation of the officer (1) (2) (3) (4) 1 M/s Indian Potash Limited, Chennai and others, (Import made through Custom House, Kakinada) F.No. VIII/26/23/05-HRU dated 19.05.2006. Commissioner of Customs and Central Excise, Visakhapatnam-II Commissionerate. 2 M/s Indian Potash Limited, Chennai and others, (Import made through Custom House, Chennai) F.No.VIII/26/23(Chennai)/05- HRU dated 09.09.2006. Commissioner of Customs (imports), Custom House Chennai. 3 M/s Indian Potash Limited, Chennai and others, (Import made through Custom House, Mangalore) F.No.VIII/26/23(Mang.)/05-HRU dated 22.09.2006. Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Mangalore. -- 1 of 2 -- 4 M/s Zuari Industries Limited, Goa and others, (Import made through Custom House, Kakinada) F.No. VIII/26/24 (KKD)/05-HRU dated 24.07.2006. Commissioner of Customs and Central Excise, Visakhapatnam-II Commissionerate 5 M/s Zuari Industries Limited, Goa and others, (Import made through Custom House, .Mangalore) F.No. VIII/26/24(Mang.) /05- HRU dated 25.08.2006. Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Mangalore. 6 M/s Gujarat Narmada Valley Fertilizers Company Limited, Bharuch and others, (Import made through Custom House, Chennai). F.No. VIII/26/25/05-HRU dated 17.08.2006. Commissioner of Customs (Imports), Custom House, Chennai. F.NO.437/ 06 / 2007-Cus.IV (Anupam Prakash) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 2 of 2 --
